title: Preparation of Proteoliposomes
author: Zehra Kahveci
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rvwd67e

steps.title: Giant Unilamellar Vesicles (GUVs) Preparation by...
steps.instruction: Giant Unilamellar Vesicles (GUVs) Preparation by Electroformation Method by Zehra Kahveci

steps.title: Prepare 2 eppendorfs containing 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Prepare 2 eppendorfs containing 100 µL of 195 mM sucrose solution (freshly made in Hepes buffer 5mM pH 7.4) and add 100 µL of electroformation product into each eppendorf.

steps.title: Dilute the membrane transporter (~5mg/mL) in...
steps.instruction: Dilute the membrane transporter (~5mg/mL) in Poly(ethylene glycol) octyl ether ( o-poe ), 1:1 (v:v), total volume of 1µL.

steps.title: Add 1µL of membrane transporter:o-poe 1:1...
steps.instruction: Add 1µL of membrane transporter:o-poe 1:1 (v:v) into Eppendorf 1 (SAMPLE)

steps.title: Shake the SAMPLE and BLANK gently upside-down
steps.instruction: Shake the SAMPLE and BLANK gently upside-down.

steps.title: Place both tubes on to a...
steps.instruction: Place both tubes on to a shaker, shake them at ~600 rpm. 01:00:00 Undetermined

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5 mg Biobeads into both tubes.

steps.title: Store the SAMPLE and BLANK in...
steps.instruction: Store the SAMPLE and BLANK in the fridge at 4°C, overnight.

steps.title: Cut a pipette tip, collect the...
steps.instruction: Cut a pipette tip, collect the SAMPLE and the BLANK from each each eppendorf and put the SAMPLE and BLANK into new eppendorfs.

steps.title: The SAMPLE and the BLANK can...
steps.instruction: The SAMPLE and the BLANK can be used in the following 4-5 days. (Store in the fridge).

steps.title: Shake the tubes upside-down, place them...
steps.instruction: Shake the tubes upside-down, place them on to a shaker and shake them at ~600 rpm. 01:00:00 Undetermined
